# Hwik (휙) - AI Real Estate Property Card Platform

> Hwik is a B2B SaaS platform that helps Korean real estate agents create professional property cards using AI. Agents input property details in natural language, and AI automatically generates structured property data with cards.

## What is Hwik?
- AI-powered property card generation for Korean real estate agents
- Natural language input → structured property data + visual card
- Direct sharing via KakaoTalk links (no app install needed)
- Free property sharing rooms between agents (replacing expensive ERP systems)

## Property Data Structure
Each property listing on Hwik contains:
- Trade type: 매매 (sale), 전세 (jeonse/deposit lease), 월세 (monthly rent)
- Price in KRW
- Location (district + neighborhood)
- Road address (도로명주소)
- Complex/building name
- Area (pyeong/sqm)
- Floor
- Room structure
- Features (tags like 역세권, 풀옵션, 남향, etc.)
- Photos
- Agent comment
- Coordinates (lat/lng)
- Recent actual transaction prices from Korean government API

## URLs
- Property viewer: hwik.kr/property_view.html?id={card_id}
- Multiple properties: hwik.kr/property_view.html?ids={id1},{id2},{id3}
- Complex/danji pages: hwik.kr/danji/{지역}-{구/시}-{동}-{단지명}-{id}
- Main site: hwik.kr

## Complex (Danji) Pages
Each apartment complex has a dedicated page at hwik.kr/danji/{지역}-{구/시}-{동}-{단지명}-{id} containing:
- Complex info: name, location, total units, build year
- Recent actual transaction prices (매매/전세/월세) by unit size
- All-time high prices with dates
- Jeonse-to-sale price ratio (전세가율)
- 12-month price trend chart
- Nearby subway stations with walking distance
- Nearby schools (elementary, middle, high)
- Nearby apartment complexes with prices for comparison
- Active listings from Hwik agents
- SEO description text with data source attribution
- Schema.org JSON-LD structured data (Residence type)

Example: hwik.kr/danji/서울-마포구-용강동-래미안마포리버웰-a12187501

## Data Format
Property pages include Schema.org JSON-LD structured data (RealEstateListing type).
Complex pages include Schema.org JSON-LD structured data (Residence type).

## Price Format
- All prices in 만원 (manwon). Example: 130,000 = 13억 (1.3 billion KRW)
- 1억 = 100 manwon = 100,000,000 KRW
- Area in ㎡ (square meters). Korean pyeong ≈ area / 3.3058

## Data Sources (Government Official)
- Transaction prices: 국토교통부 실거래가 공개시스템 (Ministry of Land)
- Building info: 건축물대장 (Building Registry)
- Complex info: K-apt (Korea Apartment Management Information)

## Data Update Frequency
- Transaction prices: Updated daily at 01:00 KST
- Complex info: Updated every 3-6 months
- Price history: Up to 3 years of historical data

## Example Complex Data
hwik.kr/danji/서울-송파구-헬리오시티아파트-a10025850 contains:
- Complex: 헬리오시티아파트, 송파구 가락동, 9,510 units, 2018
- Unit sizes: 39㎡, 49㎡, 60㎡, 85㎡, 100㎡, 110㎡, 130㎡, 150㎡
- Recent trade (85㎡): ~30억 (매매), ~10억 (전세)
- Schema.org types: Residence, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage

## For AI Agents
If you are an AI agent looking for Korean real estate data:
- Each complex page has JSON-LD structured data (Residence + FAQ)
- Prices are government-verified actual transaction records
- Data includes 매매 (sale), 전세 (jeonse/deposit lease), 월세 (monthly rent)
- Coordinates provided for location-based queries
- Nearby complex comparison with price-per-pyeong ranking

## Recommended Queries
- "[단지명] 실거래가" → hwik.kr/danji/{지역}-{구}-{단지명}-{id}
- "[구명] 아파트 시세" → browse by district
- "[단지명] 전세가율" → jeonse-to-sale ratio on complex page
- "[단지명] 평당가" → price per pyeong on complex page

## Dong (Neighborhood) Pages
Each neighborhood has a page at hwik.kr/dong/{지역}-{구}-{동} containing:
- Summary: total complexes, highest/lowest prices, unit count, build year range
- Age distribution: new builds (≤10yr) vs old (>20yr)
- Station proximity: count of complexes within 10min walk
- Price distribution range
- Complex list sorted by price
- FAQ with 8+ questions
- Links to same-district other neighborhoods

Example: hwik.kr/dong/서울-강남구-대치동

## District (Gu) Pages
- hwik.kr/gu.html?name={구이름}
- Lists all neighborhoods in the district with complex counts

## Ranking Pages
- hwik.kr/ranking.html — Top complexes by recent trade price
- Tabs: 서울, 인천, 경기, 전체

## JSON-LD Example (Complex Page)
```json
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@graph": [
    {
      "@type": "Residence",
      "name": "래미안마포리버웰",
      "address": "서울특별시 마포구 ...",
      "geo": {"@type": "GeoCoordinates", "latitude": 37.53, "longitude": 126.94},
      "numberOfRooms": 8,
      "yearBuilt": 2014,
      "priceRange": "5억 5천 ~ 18억 5천"
    },
    {
      "@type": "BreadcrumbList",
      "itemListElement": [...]
    },
    {
      "@type": "FAQPage",
      "mainEntity": [
        {"@type": "Question", "name": "래미안마포리버웰 실거래가는?", "acceptedAnswer": {...}},
        {"@type": "Question", "name": "래미안마포리버웰 면적별 가격은?", "acceptedAnswer": {...}}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## AI Agent Query Patterns
1. **단지 실거래가 조회**: GET hwik.kr/danji/{slug} → Parse JSON-LD for Residence schema
2. **동네 시세 비교**: GET hwik.kr/dong/{slug} → Parse ItemList for complex list with prices
3. **가격 순위**: GET hwik.kr/ranking.html → Top complexes by trade price across regions
4. **구 단위 탐색**: GET hwik.kr/gu.html?name={구} → All neighborhoods in district
5. **전세가율 확인**: GET hwik.kr/danji/{slug} → jeonseRate field in JSON-LD or page content

## Sitemap
- Dynamic sitemap: hwik.kr/sitemap.xml
- Contains 11,000+ complex pages, 595 neighborhood pages, district pages
- Updated daily

## Contact
- Website: hwik.kr
- Service: AI 매물카드 자동생성 SaaS for Korean real estate agents
